text.title: Workflow Spec Phase Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of the spec.md frontmatter + body index for workflow-spec-phase. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner plural; status auto-Accepted by agent (forbidden); FR id format wrong + soft language; out_of_scope empty; success not measurable.

forbidden.pattern: FR statement contains "should be nice" / "would be great" / lacks SHALL or MUST.
`out_of_scope` has fewer than 2 entries — scope is unbounded.
Success criterion is an adjective ("useful", "smooth"); no measurable number or observable outcome.
Subagent emitted `status: Accepted` — only a named human owner promotes.
